curation_notes: Primary location is extract_archive() in keras/src/utils/file_utils.py, which calls tarfile.extractall() with a custom filter_safe_paths() member filter but without the filter='data' parameter. The PATH_MAX symlink resolution bug in Python's tarfile module bypasses the member-level filtering. Secondary location is DiskIOStore.__init__() in keras/src/saving/saving_lib.py, which called archive.extractall() with no path filtering at all. The pre-assigned vulnerability class path-traversal (CWE-22) is correct — the advisory explicitly describes directory traversal via malicious tar archives.
